# teams2 app package download

Download a Teams app package

## Usage

```
teams2 app package download [appId] [options]
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description | Required |
|----------|-------------|----------|
| `appId` | App ID | No |

## Options

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `-o, --output <path>` | [OPTIONAL] Output file path (defaults to &lt;appName&gt;.zip) |
<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
